items_verified: SB-002: data-collapsible attribute propagation — group selectors on aside
SB-003: shadcn Tooltip on collapsed nav items via TooltipProvider
SB-005: Clusters inline accordion with ChevronDown rotation
SB-006: CSS transition-[width] duration-200 ease-out replaces Motion spring
SB-008: Active border bar w-[3px] → w-[2px]
SB-009: Cmd+B toggle works (200ms CSS transition, not spring)
SB-010: Clusters parent active when on /clusters/* route
SB-011: Inline cluster sub-nav under accordion

findings.description: keyboardToggleRef is set in Cmd+B handler but never consumed — dead code. SB-009 spec says duration-50 for keyboard but actual transition is always duration-200. 200ms is still fast and acceptable.
Mobile aside has both CSS transform classes (translate-x-0 / -translate-x-full) AND inline style={{ transform }}. Inline style wins, making CSS classes dead code.
Clusters nav item uses <Link href='#'> with e.preventDefault(). A <button> would be more semantically correct for an accordion trigger. aria-expanded is correctly set.
